title: Intraday-momentum primary (first-interval -> last-interval), H1, all 8 assets
source: quant-phd-advisor literature survey 2026-05-29 (intraday edges on FX/metals/crypto at H1). See project-no-edge-h4-primary-direct memory + hackathon plan.
why: Sign of first-block session return predicts last-block return (infrequent rebalancing + late-informed flow). The ONLY short-horizon edge replicated across equities (Gao 2018 JFE), FX (Elaut/Erdos JBF), gold/silver (PMC 2020), and crypto (Wen 2022). Best-evidenced candidate; structural mechanism, not arbitrageable mispricing.
value_rationale: Edge-search for the hackathon competition book (H1, conservative vol-target). B0080 is the front-runner (best OOS evidence across all asset classes) and is spiked first.
scope: Rule-based primary returning {-1,0,+1}: long if first-block H1 return >0 going into last block (per-asset session anchor; FX/metals fixed UTC open, crypto UTC day or 22:00 window).

Test (in-sample, before WF): regress sign(last-block ret) on first-block ret, Newey-West t; scan interval pairs per asset; confirm |t|>2 AND hit-rate>53% AND strengthens on high-vol days. Lock interval on train slice, confirm OOS (PurgedTimeSeriesSplit).
Caveat: interval-mining overfit (12x12 scan finds spurious winner) -> must lock + OOS. Expected gross Sharpe 0.6-1.2.

history.reason: registered by hackathon-pm from quant-phd-advisor shortlist
feat(backlog): register intraday-edge shortlist B0080-B0083 from quant-phd-advisor survey

Intraday-momentum primary fails OOS on H1: train-strong assets (EUR/XAU/XAG) die on holdout (mining artifact); BTC/SOL holdout positives lack train support. See results/feasibility/b0080_intraday_momentum.json + spike commit.
feat(spike): B0080 intraday-momentum H1 -- fails out-of-sample
chore(coordination): B0080 discarded (fails OOS); record edge-search pattern
feat(spike): crypto/lead-lag/pairs edges all fail OOS; edge search exhausted
